desc: InProgress Research Inc. Your Way to The Connected World of Things. is a Toronto based Internet of Things technology startup. desc: SimplifyIT specializes in comprehensive, flat-rate services for small and mid-sized businesses (1 to 500 users) and offers shared infrastructure services to large enterprise clients (501 to 5,000 users). We have invested in sophisticated tools and developed custom processes to protect your data, keep your computer systems reliable and your employees productive. Our strong commitment to preventative maintenance and proactive planning is a big reason we stand apart from our competitors. SimplifyIT s flagship service is SimplifyIT CIO. SimplifyIT CIO is a flat-rate monthly service that includes all of the labor, software, hardware and services that are required to keep your systems running smoothly. SimplifyIT CIO provides around-the-clock monitoring and maintenance of your network and computer systems to prevent downtime, outages and other technical problems before they interrupt your business. SimplifyIT CIO also offers unlimited, remote technical support to respond quickly to emergency issues and keep your team productive. SimplifyIT CIO offers the following advantages over traditional services: *Fixed monthly payments no more guessing games for budgets *Immediate web-based remote technical support no more waiting for on-site technicians *On-going monthly preventative maintenance increased productivity.
